task.objective: Add an optional local declared-scope JSON input to the local GitHub PR importer so its existing deterministic packet reports changed paths outside caller-supplied scope patterns without making an authorization, Policy, Evidence, readiness, release, or Verdict decision.

forbidden: modification of existing Machine Task Contracts
direct HTTP or GraphQL clients outside the local gh CLI
API key, token, credential, billing, credit, paid cloud, or paid SaaS setup
PR body, review body, patch body, command log, or target file-content collection
target repository checkout, code execution, or verification execution
API, MCP, web, GitHub App, SARIF, or model-provider delivery surfaces
canonical terminology, Verdict, Trust, Evidence authority, or product-semantic changes
product readiness, trusted release, or authoritative Proofrail product Verdict claims

requirements: Add GATE-SCOPE-001 as the first branch commit.
Add optional --scope-file <scope.json> to pnpm evidence-gate:github only; omitted scope input preserves current packet JSON and human output byte-for-byte.

Accept one local JSON object with exactly declaredWriteScope as an array of bounded non-empty string patterns; reject malformed, unknown, duplicate, unsafe, or unreadable input before invoking gh without disclosing input content.
Map supplied patterns only to the existing packet scope.declaredWriteScope field so the existing deterministic evaluator reports outsideDeclaredScope and review needs.
Keep scope informational: never decide authorization, Policy, Evidence sufficiency, independent acceptance, readiness, trusted release, or a Proofrail product Verdict.
Preserve bounded read-only gh collection, exact-head behavior, JSON/human format behavior, one newline, and no target checkout or execution.

Add a sanitized declared-scope fixture and tests for matching and outside paths, omitted compatibility, malformed/unknown/duplicate/safe input rejection before gh, JSON/human output, stdout/file output, determinism, and scope-language non-overclaim.
Add concise README usage/security-boundary documentation and a Phase 2 plan record.
Use no dependency or lockfile change.

requiredInvariants: The MTC is the first branch commit and every changed path is writable.
Omitted scope input remains byte-compatible with the pre-scope GitHub importer output.
Scope input is parsed and validated locally before gh, never interpolated into a shell, and never becomes an authorization or Verdict decision.
Existing packet scope derivation remains the only classifier for outsideDeclaredScope; claims and missing evidence remain explicit.
No dependency, lockfile, target execution, GitHub write, authority, semantic, collection-boundary, readiness, or Verdict change is introduced.

stopConditions: External dependency or lockfile change required
Credentials, API keys, credits, billing, paid cloud, or paid SaaS required: BLOCKED_COST_RISK
Target checkout, content or patch collection, or target execution required: BLOCKED_SCOPE
Authority or product semantics must change: BLOCKED_SCOPE
Existing defect cannot be resolved within scope: BLOCKED_SCOPE
